name: Titanic
value: Based on the features of Titanic passengers (such as sex, age and socio-economic class), I want to build a model to determine which types of people were more likely to survive.

name: House Prices
value: Using features describing various aspects of residential homes, I need to build a model to predict the final price of each house. I have to consider factors as size and number of bedrooms.

name: Digit Recognizer
value: Using records recovered from the damaged computer system, I aim to help rescue crews retrieve the lost passengers by using data science skills. I have to predict which passengers were transported to an alternate dimension after the Spaceship Titanic collided with a spacetime anomaly.
